reasons: Remote endpoint could not be verified

reports.summary: "custom-remote" could not be verified (insufficient evidence). Risk: Network (S1 Read-only utility).

observed.title: Remote server source cannot be verified
observed.impact: The server runs on an unverified remote endpoint. Its tools, permissions, and behavior cannot be inspected statically and may change at any time.
observed.fix: Use a verified first-party endpoint, or run the server from a pinned, inspectable package.
observed.falsePositiveNote: A trusted internal endpoint may be fine; add it to the policy allowlist to verify it.
